title: رفع ساخت ربات زیرمجموعه در پنل نماینده
summary: تابع createDownlineResellerBot که دو مسیر پنل وب و مدیریت تلگرامی آن را فراخوانی می‌کردند در Edge تعریف نشده بود. این نسخه تابع کامل ساخت، اعتبارسنجی، ثبت مالی اتمیک، تنظیم Webhook و بستن خودکار خطای فعال را اضافه می‌کند.
features: restores createDownlineResellerBot for both reseller-control web actions and Telegram owner sessions
validates master ownership, active license, token uniqueness, owner uniqueness, control credentials, pricing and wallet balance
configures Telegram webhook and commands before committing financial changes
creates the child bot without an independent PasarGuard panel and inherits the master service agency
records initial balance transfer and setup fee income transparently in wallet_ledger
resolves matching CLIENT_RESELLER_CONTROL_UNHANDLED_REJECTION records after a successful creation
refreshes reseller-control browser and service-worker cache keys to 3.4.3
changes: خطای createDownlineResellerBot is not defined حذف شد.
ساخت ربات زیرمجموعه از صفحه Downline و دستور تلگرام مستر به یک تابع مشترک و کامل متصل شد.
Webhook و توکن قبل از برداشت موجودی بررسی می‌شوند تا ربات نیمه‌ساخته پولی ایجاد نشود.
موجودی اولیه از مستر منتقل و هزینه ساخت از حساب زیرمجموعه به درآمد مستر ثبت می‌شود.
خطای فعال مربوط به همین نقص پس از اولین ساخت موفق به resolved تغییر می‌کند.

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP to the central bot or GitHub, then deploy Core, Edge and Processor together
deployment.server_install_version_rule: server provisioning remains independent of Worker update availability; equal versions are valid
deployment.critical_component: Edge must be deployed because the missing function is in edge/worker.js

security.credentials: bot tokens remain encrypted; control passwords are salted and hashed
security.financial_consistency: Telegram configuration is verified before D1 wallet mutations and the D1 batch is conditional on master balance

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.static_regression: passed: one shared createDownlineResellerBot definition, two call sites, 30 SQL placeholders matched to 30 bind values, happy-path and insufficient-wallet mock tests passed
validation.archive_integrity: passed: ZIP created with expected 23 entries and verified with unzip -t
validation.live_cloudflare_test: not run; requires the deployed Cloudflare account, Telegram bot tokens and production bindings

limitations: A real Telegram getMe, setWebhook and D1 transaction can only be confirmed after deployment.
The representative bot owner must have started the new Telegram bot before it can send direct messages.
Core, Edge and Processor should be deployed together, with Edge being mandatory for this fix.
